title: The greatest economic gambit of our time
section_path: The greatest economic gambit of our time
section_path_text: The greatest economic gambit of our time
summary:
Main
The three things investors need to focus on, in this very crucial week:
The risk-off is mostly focused on equities. Bonds are still a safe haven and businesses, though worried, have prepared inventories ahead of the Trade War. Our House View, for the time being, is that tariffs are likely still intended to be a negotiating tool, a way to apply pressure.
